tavily.answer: In 2025, the number of internal displacements caused by violence or conflict reached a record high, surpassing those caused by natural disasters for the first time, according to a report by the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre. In Greece, authorities warned residents of parts of Thessaloniki to stay indoors due to toxic smoke from a wildfire near the city. Additionally, Greece arrested a Palestinian man suspected of being a Hamas operative planning a terrorist attack against Israeli targets, including an Israeli cruise liner.
